name: compliant_server
description: A well-configured MCP server that follows all security and quality best practices.

tools.name: search_documents
tools.description: Searches documents in the workspace by keyword and returns matching document titles and snippets.

query.description: The search keyword or phrase to look for across all workspace documents.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return.

tools.name: create_note
tools.description: Creates a new note with the given title and body text in the notes collection.

title.description: The title of the note, displayed in the notes list.

body.description: The full text content of the note.

tools.name: list_notes
tools.description: Lists all notes in the workspace, returning their IDs, titles, and creation timestamps.

limit.description: Maximum number of notes to return.

resources.name: notes_directory
resources.description: The notes directory containing all user notes.
